title: East Anglia Two Offshore Wind Farm: post-consent condition compliance, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State as to whether a signed guarantee between East Anglia Two Limited and ScottishPower Renewables (UK) Limited provided suitable security to cover any claims for compensation relating to the exercise of any compulsory acquisition powers granted in the East Anglia Two Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022.  Date of decision  13 August 2025  Company/location   East Anglia Two Limited. Located in the southern North Sea approximately 32.6 km from the Suffolk coast at its nearest point off Southwold and 37.5 km to Lowestoft.   Type of project  Post-consent condition compliance under the Planning Act 2008.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
